style: Graphic-novel illustration, bold inked linework, cel-shaded flats with hard shadow edges, limited palette of crimson red, deep navy and gunmetal slate, dramatic single key light. Painterly sci-fi comic panel. No text, no speech bubbles, no captions, no lettering, no borders, no panel gutters.

images.scene: Wide view of a civilian convoy caught mid-destruction: eleven ships in a ragged line, the lead hulls already blooming into silent fire, lance beams cutting across the formation from off-frame, debris fanning outward, no people.
